programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1985, a young nurse is sexually assaulted by an unknown assailant, and she turns to law enforcement to catch this predator. Despite decades passing, she holds onto the hope that justice will be served.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Decades after the 1982 killing of Christina Castiglione, investigative genetic genealogy unmasks the predator responsible for her rape and murder in Redford Township, Michigan.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The 1972 rape and murder of nine-year-old Debbie Lynn Randall, who was abducted not far from her home in Marietta, Georgia, is solved five decades later with the help of forensic science.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Michigan, 1996, a body is found on the side of a road, wrapped in a blanket. The victim is Sharon Hammack. Detectives use new technology in an attempt to solve this cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is out for a run she is brutally attacked and raped by a stranger. Police use groundbreaking genetic genealogy to identify the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Salt Lake City, 2010, Sherry Black is found stabbed to death in her bookshop. Police fail to identify her killer until advanced DNA science reignites the case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976 Wisconsin, 25-year-old David Schuldes and 24-year-old Ellen Matheys are murdered in a park. The case goes cold until 2015 when new DNA science is found.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Police solve the decades-old cold case of Clare Holman through new advancements in DNA technology.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, 19-year-old Janet Stallcup goes missing while on her way to a party. Eight days later, her body is found in her car.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1978, the body of 16-year-old Krisann Baxter is found in Washington. Investigators try to find Krisann's killer, but don't find any answers.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1989, Krista Martin's life is tragically cut short because of an intruder. A friend finds her and calls 911, starting an investigation that will span four decades.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In Chandler, Arizona in 1991, an intruder viciously sexually assaults a woman in her own home. The case goes unsolved for decades until revolutionary science connects the dots.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1995 in Beaumont, Texas, the parents of Catherine Edwards find her body in her bathroom. The killer evades justice, that is, until forensic science catches up with him.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Will a new forensic science tool find the killer of Cathy Sposito, murdered on an Arizona hiking trail in 1987?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Susan Eads is found murdered in Texas in 1983. Decades later, can modern forensics finally find the perpetrator?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1986, Barbara Carr was killed in a home invasion, while her husband escaped. New science may finally unearth a suspect.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder in 1991, will determination and forensic tools find Danielle Clause's killer?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's skeletal remains are found in Okaloosa County in 1994. It sparks a years-long search for her identity and killer, until a new forensic tool provides answers.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A young woman is found beaten to death in the snow of rural Wisconsin in 1984. The killer evades detection of the police for decades. How will a breakthrough in DNA testing methods reveal the killer's identity?

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Judgment Day
programme.desc: There’s a nervous tension in the air on Judgment Day for all therookies at 15 Division who will have to undergo make-or-break assessments by Staff Sergeant Frank.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Takedown
programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Butterflies
programme.desc: Andy's world explodes when a fresh-faced university student is killed in a random shooting, and a bullet hits Andy, lodging in her vest.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Might Have Been
programme.desc: Everyone's living their “might-have-beens.” Andy and Gail go undercover as cocktail waitresses to clean up a drug-infested club, but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bad Moon
programme.desc: As a full moon hangs over the city, the rookies are unnerved by a series of strange occurrences. While investigating the theft of three severed heads, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a mentally unstable man who has stopped taking his medication

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart & Sparks
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Det. Luke Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in the torching of a laundromat – and the rookies are forced to confront their own burning issues.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Stung
programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: In Plain View
programme.desc: When a police informant is found murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the notoriously brutal East Jameson gang. Andy has to work closely with Detective Jo Rosati, a woman who seems far too interested in Andy’s fiancé, Luke.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Little Faith
programme.desc: When Traci and Andy are sent out on an undercover training exercise, they stumble upon a young woman who is about to die of an overdose. Meanwhile, Dov finds himself on a “ride-along” with a drug dealer and old friend of his deceased brother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: On The Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer. Meanwhile, Swarek’s off the grid, trying to get information out of former crime enforcer Jamie Brennan

programme.title: Rookie Blue: God’s Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated by Jamie Brennan in the basement of a Pickering farmhouse, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.
programme.sub-title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As local high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of an armed police car. While tracking down the stolen vehicle, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a volatile teen boy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a young black teenager.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Parker
programme.desc: A thief is double-crossed by his crew and left for dead. Forming an unlikely alliance with a woman on the inside, he looks to hijack the score of the crew's latest heist.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Joey, an alcoholic war veteran assumes a new identity after returning from a traumatic tour in Afghanistan and becomes a vigilante in a bid to atone for his sins.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop (Jason Statham) goes after a serial killer who targets police officers.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: Powered by an artificial heart, Chev Chelios (Jason Statham) embarks on a frantic chase through Los Angeles to find the thief who stole his own, nearly indestructible, one.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Joey, an alcoholic war veteran assumes a new identity after returning from a traumatic tour in Afghanistan and becomes a vigilante in a bid to atone for his sins.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop (Jason Statham) goes after a serial killer who targets police officers.

programme.title: After the Storm
programme.desc: A loner (Benjamin Bratt) and a wealthy businessman (Armand Assante) try to recover treasure from a sunken yacht off the coast of the Bahamas.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: A vacation in Spain turns nightmarish when a man's (Henry Cavill) family is kidnapped by agents who are hell-bent on recovering a mysterious briefcase.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: A dramatization of the disaster in April 2010, when the offshore drilling rig called the Deepwater Horizon exploded, resulting in the worst oil spill in American history.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A man's family is turned upside down when he discovers that his son's college sweetheart is the same woman he rescued from a secret military experiment twenty years before...only she has not aged a day since. Peter Onorati and Fred Savage star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When the Stream -- an artificial system providing information to all society members through computer chips implanted in their brains -- begins to malfunction, an unlikely, primitive man (George Newbern) may be mankind's only hope.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After a chemical war renders the world's population unable to conceive healthy children, a mother and father must escape from a sinister government agency intent on using their miraculously healthy newborn to repopulate the species.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: In a society imprisoned for generations by extraterrestrials who invaded Earth, an electronics expert (Harley Jane Kozak) discovers that not only are her human jailers really machines, but they also have been holding prisoners for nearly a century.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A preacher descends upon the 18th-century town of Heart's Desire and offers to share his extraordinary powers with four outlaws. But who is this stranger and why has he given these outlaws such deadly powers? Caspar Van Dien and Esai Morales star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Attempting to deliver serum to a plague-stricken planet, a pilot (Eric McCormack) and his crew crash land on an unknown moon. Bitten by an alien spider while fixing the ship, the pilot's mind wanders between alternate realities…in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A woman unable to feel emotions gets a new lease on life when a brain implant allows her to experience feelings for the first time. But, when the implant malfunctions, driving her towards insanity, she is shocked at the real cause of her problems.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A remorseless, uncaring scientist (Stephen Lang) and his partner (Michael Ontkean) discover a way to bring life back to the recently deceased. But after the scientist is killed and brought back to life himself, will he choose to live differently?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Brilliant geneticist Martin Nodel (Ron Rifkin) unlocks a secret code imprinted on human DNA. But when he tests this code on himself, his instincts draw him to a remote location where he finds a trip…to The Outer Limits. Ryan Reynolds co-stars.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When it is not known if aliens headed to Earth are friend or foe, five people are placed in secret bunkers to man switches that, if not pressed at specified intervals, will set off mass destruction that will destroy everything, alien or human alike.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Engaged as soldiers on a distant planet to prevent a race of alien bugs from stealing minerals that provide the Earth's energy, a woman (Christine Elise) and her troops accidentally discover that the real enemy may not be the aliens at all.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a seemingly harmless audio signal from space causes physiological changes in Earth's youth, a young scientist races against time to discover what exactly is happening and why. Could the changes be necessary for the survival of the planet?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A despondent man finds himself torn between killing himself and killing his co-workers. Before he can do either, he's pulled into The Outer Limits where there are hundreds of versions of him, each with a different life and a different character.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A woman's life changes dramatically when she accidentally shoots herself in the head which causes her to not only grow more intelligent, but also to realize how dull her life was before the photo in a picture frame started talking to her.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When an incident at a space station leaves three people dead, the captain of the ship returns to Earth to face murder charges. Is the captain a murderous madman? Or has he actually seen the face of evil floating in the zero-gravity of deep space?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: The residents of a suburban neighborhood have their lives turned upside down when a four block section of their subdivision is ripped from the earth by a mysterious force and transported to a distant planet. David McCallum and Laura Harris star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Muckraking TV journalist Donald Rivers (Alan Thicke), host of The Whole Truth, has the show of a lifetime: rock solid-proof that the government and private defense contractors have been engaging in secret genetic cloning.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Using an experimental treatment, a scientist (Pat Morita) helps an aging athlete (Adrian Pasdar) end his career on a high note by accelerating his reflexes for one last match. But with victory comes side-effects...courtesy of The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: In a society controlled by aliens, a mother rebels when she is forced to give up her child to Mother, a wise alien who acts as a parent to all infants. Determined to get the child back, she embarks upon a dangerous quest that will change her world.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Two brothers wrestle for control of their father's million-dollar pharmaceutical company. But when one brother discovers a drug which may hold the secret to eternal life, the battle for control becomes a rapid trip toward self-destruction.

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: UFOs Over Phoenix: Confessions of a 911 Operator
programme.desc: An infamous mass sighting of a colossal UFO has taken an interesting turn as two new witnesses have come forward with new revelations about the V-shaped objects flying over the Arizona sky.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: In 1956, an object was detected over the North Sea heading toward Bentwaters RAF base--a base with nuclear weapons.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: What secrets lay buried in the never-before-seen files of a famous UFO investigator?

programme.title: Alien Reptilian Legacy
programme.desc: Researchers reveal the presence of a supreme and nefarious interdimensional intelligence that has been manipulating mankind for centuries. Interviews with experiencers and alien abductees expose a sinister agenda behind the alien presence on Earth.

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Ufos and Bizarre Encounters
programme.desc: Learn new information from Alien Occultists to shocking Alien encounters, from reverse engineering to military deals with Grey Aliens and Project Sigma.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: Police tapes, video, and the testimony of a radar operator suggest something very strange was seen over Ohio in 1994; Holland, Michigan in 1994; and Millstadt, Illinois in 2000.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: On December 29, 1980, Betty Cash, Vickie Landrum, and Colby Landrum took a drive that would soon become a life-changing nightmare.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: UFOs: The Best Evidence Volume 2 - The Government Cover-Up
programme.desc: This volume of UFOs the Best Evidence focuses on The Government Coverup: Examines how governments, especially our own, have been hiding the truth about secret UFO studies, astronaut encounters and military battles with alien craft.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: Area 51 is considered the ultimate top-secret facility, one that UFO investigators believe houses an extraterrestrial secret. But is there an even more secretive facility?

programme.title: Aliens Among Us: The Michael Wolf Theory
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf shares 30 years of insights on UFOs, aliens, government projects, and crop circles.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: On October 26, 1994, the U.S. government made their first official acknowledgement of Area 51.

programme.title: Alien Global Threat
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that world governments have had a pact with aliens for decades and that human abductions are being allowed by government and military factions.

programme.title: A Field Full of Secrets
programme.desc: In 2008, two best friends stepped into their very first crop circle in southern England. This is story of what happened next.

programme.title: Area 51, Roswell Crash, Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Area 51 is located at the center of UFO research and legends of extra-terrestrial folklore. It is located six hundred miles west of Roswell, New Mexico, where the infamous Roswell UFO crashed in 1947. Also in this episode The Allagash Alien Abductions .

programme.desc: A truck driver is trapped in his crushed cab after a motorway smash, while in Hull, firefighters handcuff a man to the rails of the Humber Bridge to stop him from jumping.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A woman fights for her life after being knifed by her former partner, while a teenager on her way to seeing two YouTube stars in a live appearance is felled by a falling tree.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: An innocent victim was lured to his death and cutting edge forensics helped to find the killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of a child is found, Boston State Police have no leads, but with the help of the National Centre for Missing and Exploited Children, a trace is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: David Jackson left his home to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved, until one investigator broke the case wide open.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 17th September 2006, emergency services were called to a blaze in Pinyon Pines. A house was engulfed in flames and three burned bodies were discovered inside. It soon became clear this was no accident.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Fridge Killer follows the investigation into a truly spine-chilling murder in Nevada, that led police to uncover a serial killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The 36-year investigation into Virginia Freeman's murder and the forensics that identified her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Covering the 38-year investigation into Jeannie Moore's murder.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the brutal and senseless murder of Sandra Rozzo. Attempting to understand how and why she died, and how determined police work and forensic science eventually crack the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Attacking in broad daylight, the 'M25 Rapist' became synonymous with fear and triggered one of the biggest manhunts in British history. All the police had to go on was a trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Pittsburgh Police Force and the FBI raced against time to locate missing 13-year-old Alicia Kozakiewicz. The only trace that could be found to help with their investigation were cyber forensics which led them to locating her.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Digital forensics, traditional police work and a good old-fashioned stake-out stop a killer in his tracks, when all he's left is a digital trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the tragic murder of Brett Wentworth, how police tracked his killer down and how advanced forensic technology was key to solving the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Sharon Whelan and her two daughters were murdered in their home on Christmas Eve by a cold and calculating killer. Multidiscipline forensics uncovered his horrific actions and brought him to justice.
programme.sub-title: The Murders of Sharon, Zarah and Nadia Whelan

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In February 2012, a man got into a pick-up truck at a mall close to his home and was never seen alive again. Nine months later, after a huge search was launched, police discovered his human remains.

programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm
programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Relive the dawn of the South Park era, with legendary episodes of the groundbreaking, Emmy® Award-winning animated classic. Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm

programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm

programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm
programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce
programme.desc: Mystery of The Urinal Deuce: Someone defecates in a urinal at school! Cartman rants that it's a conspiracy "like 9/11!" The entire town think so too! Time for a trip to the White House. (S10, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter than Summer: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)
programme.sub-title: Hotter than Summer: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy

programme.title: South Park: Hell on Earth 2006
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go (Part 1)
programme.desc: Go God Go (1): Cartman is impatient to get his hands on the latest games console. Result? A visit to the atheistic future of 2546! Richard Dawkins pays a visit to South Park Elementary. (S10, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII (Part 2)
programme.desc: Go God Go XII (2): Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park: With Apologies to Jesse Jackson
programme.desc: With Apologies to Jessie Jackson: Randy faces public ridicule for using the "N" word on live TV. Cartman can't resist teasing a little person who comes to school to teach about prejudice. (S11, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter Than Summer: Cartman Sucks
programme.desc: Cartman Sucks: After being caught in a compromising position with Eric, Butters is sent to a special camp to "Pray the Gay Away". Cartman tries to retrieve the incriminating photo. (S11, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Lice Capades
programme.desc: Lice Capades: Eric tries to discover the source of an outbreak of lice at the school. The lice are living peacefully in a village until they see the school nurse staring at them! (S11, E03)

programme.title: South Park: The Snuke
programme.desc: The Snuke: The citizens of South Park are gearing up for the arrival of Hillary Clinton. Eric suspects that a new student is planning a terrorist attack but the real culprits are deadlier. (S11, E04)

programme.title: South Park: Fantastic Easter Special
programme.desc: Fantastic Easter Special: Stan sets out to find a reason for painting Easter eggs and discovers his father is part of a society called "The Hare Club For Men", but all is not what it seems. (S11, E05)

programme.title: South Park: D-Yikes!
programme.desc: D-Yikes!: Ms. Garrison decides that she is a lesbian after getting dumped again but hell breaks loose when her new favourite lesbian bar faces a takeover from Persians in a '300' stylee. (S11, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Night of the Living Homeless
programme.desc: Night of the Living Homeless: When a plague of homeless people hits South Park, the boys devise a plan to move them on whilst the adults panic like they're in a zombie movie. (S11, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Le Petite Tourette
programme.desc: Le Petite Tourette: Cartman experiences bliss when he discovers that, by pretending to have Tourettes, he can say whatever he likes to whoever he likes! Naturally, national TV beckons. (S11, E08)

programme.title: South Park: More Cr*p
programme.desc: More Cr*p: Inadvertently, Randy breaks the world record for the 'biggest cr*p'! Bono, the previous holder, is determined to regain his crown - but he has a dark secret which may stop him. (S11, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode I
programme.desc: Imaginationland - Episode I: The boys find themselves in a magical land where all of the world's imagination is laid out before them. (S11, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: Imaginationland - Episode II: The government are holding Stan and Kyle captive, to find out how they got into Imaginationland. Butters is in trouble with evil creatures like Snarf! (S11, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Imaginationland- Episode III: Stan and Butters are stuck in Imaginationland fighting for their lives, while Cartman goes all the way to the supreme court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet. (S11, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Guitar Queer-o: Stan and Kyle are set to hit big time with their skills on computer game Guitar Hero. Their manager convinces Stan that Kyle is holding him back. Will the "band" break up? (S11, E13)

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Inferno
programme.desc: Kim and Craig move into their dream home in rural Bagley, Iowa with Kim’s two young daughters. When an unseen entity attacks the family, Kim and Craig realize they could be dealing with a ghost. They turn to a demonologist to help them reclaim the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spellbound
programme.desc: Sandra learns her house is haunted. She tries to perform Wiccan ceremonies but opens a portal.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When Tracey Berrios experiences paranormal activity inside her new home, she suspects spirits tied to the house's history. But after something evil attacks Tracey, she fears for the safety of her family and turns to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Field Of Ghosts
programme.desc: For as long as she can remember, Markie Beason has sensed something horrible happened in her home and becomes frightened to be alone in the house. Her father David, reaches out to a paranormal investigation group in hopes they can bring peace to the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Past
programme.desc: As Deborah Utley begins experiencing paranormal events in her home, she turns to her faith for protection. But when her children are targeted by the entity she seeks the aid of paranormal investigators to end the cycle of terror.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Never Dies
programme.desc: Jennifer Hoke’s family found their dream home along the waterfront in Florida; little do they know something dark is lurking in their dream house. What starts as strange noises escalates to physical attacks. The family turns to a local empath for answers.

programme.title: A Haunting: House Of Sorrows
programme.desc: In 2012, Darrin and Jamie Shriver move into a home with tragic history. Darrin unwittingly invites dark entities back into the home threatening the safety of his wife and new baby. Paranormal investigators determine a demonic entity is in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of the Dead
programme.desc: Unseen intruders attack 10-year-old Billy Bean. He struggles to learn the secrets of the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Evil Lurks
programme.desc: Soon after the Shea family moves into their new home, eerie noises and ghostly voices begin.

programme.title: A Haunting: Eternal Grief
programme.desc: Shortly after moving into her home in Indiana, Jennifer Patterson receives a warning from a stranger that she is not alone in the house. When she hears strange voices, she begins to wonder if the previous owner, who died in the house, still inhabits it.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Rises
programme.desc: After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: When The Lights Go Out
programme.desc: After newlyweds Brooke and Dominic Ardolino experience strange paranormal events in their home, they call in investigators who uncover two spirits – one is trying to warn them while the other is dangerous.

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House
programme.desc: Deb and Tony’s son is born and his toys take on a life of their own.

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror
programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When US marine veteran Darrell Blagg is found shot dead outside his New Mexico home, a lucky break leads detectives to suspect his wife has links to the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a young coal miner is murdered, shock waves are sent through a conservative mining town. Detectives try to determine the cause of the murder when multiple suspects arise.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A crazed cab driver goes on a seven-hour shooting spree, killing six people and critically injuring two.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning. They play a dangerous game of give and take, hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a missing woman is discovered by a deputy to be murdered in the backyard of her family home, investigators must learn whether the victim was killed by a mysterious driver seen lingering outside the house, or someone unexpected.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A community bands together to search for a missing woman. The police are unable to solve the case, until they speak to her husband's close friend and learn some startling information.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Police suspect that a mother of two has relapsed into drugs when she disappears, but her family and friend suspect foul play.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Exploring the various methods used by police to extract confessions. Detectives in Waterloo, Iowa attempt to uncover the truth from a man suspected of shooting two people dead in a car.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lovers. Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy's whereabouts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a single mother with a history of heart problems is found dead, detectives assume she died of natural causes. But as the investigation deepens, detectives begin to believe foul play was involved.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Almost a decade after Californian student Lynsie Ekelund went missing, detectives call the main suspect's bluff when they find human remains at the construction site he worked at.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother Heather Strong disappears, leaving her estranged husband Josh to care for her two children, as he also falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of a kind-hearted single mother points to three suspects, all claiming innocence.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A Navy veteran is brutally beaten during a home robbery. In order to find the killer, police must sift through various lies as several suspects desperately attempt to cover their tracks.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother-of-two mysteriously disappears after spending the night at a local New Mexico bar. The police race against the clock to hopefully find her alive, and are shocked by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman discovers the bludgeoned body of her nephew, investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise. With three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Investigators expose the truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of a seemingly devoted husband and father in a headline-making case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After getting a call that a wife and mother had been missing for 10 years, sheriffs launch an investigation that uncovers a web of lies that leads them to the truth.

programme.title: Frieda
programme.desc: RAF pilot Robert Dawson returns home from World War II with his new bride, Frieda, the German girl who helped him escape from a prisoner-of-war camp. They have to deal with the venomous bigotry of both Robert's family and neighbours.

programme.title: The Frightened City
programme.desc: A small time thief is recruited by a mobster to help with the racketeering. He doesn't like the job, but with the mob on his back, a femme fatale in his bed and a sick friend to care for, he will have to keep all his wits about him.

programme.title: Hell Is a City
programme.desc: A British police inspector waits for an escaped local criminal to return to his home in Manchester to pick up the spoils from his last job.

programme.title: The Riddle of the Sands
programme.desc: Two former British school friends take to the high seas to thwart a German invasion of Britain in 1901.

programme.title: Dangerous Exile
programme.desc: A French duke saves Louis XVI's son during the Reign of Terror and hides him with a woman in Wales.

programme.title: Clockwise
programme.desc: An obsessively punctual school headmaster sets out to give an important speech to a conference of headteachers. However, the day goes from bad to hideously awful when he boards the wrong train.

programme.title: Life Is a Circus
programme.desc: The Crazy Gang need to save their travelling circus from bankruptcy. Thankfully, they have an Aladdin's Lamp containing its own genie to grant the wishes they need to get this show back on the road.

programme.title: R.A.F
programme.desc: Documentary about the Royal Air Force featuring training of new recruits and aircraft of the period.

programme.title: Daybreak
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a hangman's assistant gets into a fight after he tries to seduce his boss's wife.

programme.title: Hidden Homicide
programme.desc: A writer wakes up in a strange place with a gun in his hand and a dead body, but he doesn't remember how he got there or what really happened.

programme.title: Take My Life
programme.desc: When her husband is wrongly accused of murder, an opera singer sets out to find the real culprit.

programme.title: O.H.M.S.
programme.desc: An American racketeer finds friendship and romance while hiding out as a recruit in the British army.

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Daughter Told Me You Cheated!
programme.desc: Tammy suspects her husband Johnnie is sleeping with Renee and is Robert listening to his sister and cheating on his teen fiancée Raven? Plus, did Tom sleep with his best friend’s wife Angela? Marriages are on cliff’s edge today!
programme.sub-title: My Daughter Told Me You Cheated!

programme.title: The Maury Show: This Test Will Tell…Do I really Have 10 Kids?
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé Deon get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, William believes that his 2 of his 6 kids with ex-wife Nicole aren’t his and could be the father of another’s woman’s kid! Our DNA tests reveal the truth!
programme.sub-title: This Test Will Tell…Do I really Have 10 Kids?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Fiancé Cheat with Over 50 Women and My Best Friend?
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, Don and Amy are back for another lie detector test! This time Don wants to know if Amy is sleeping with his brother! Will they ace their tests?
programme.sub-title: Did My Fiancé Cheat with Over 50 Women and My Best Friend?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Jasmine says her fiancé, Erica, left her for another woman, so Karamo must unlock Erica's phone to quell Jasmine's fears; Quan and Laz return to tell what things have been like since their last appearance on the show.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: 13 Years Together & You're Lying; Update: Lie Detector Test Unlocks the Truth

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On today's all new Karamo, Chloe fears that her 14-year-old daughter, Meh'lan, is self-destructing. Chloe says Meh'lan is disrespectful, fighting, stealing, and consorting with the wrong crowd.
programme.sub-title: I'm Paralyzed & My Daughter Disrespects Me

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On today's Karamo, when Lacey lost her husband, her best friend and god mother to her children, Sam, was nowhere to be found. Next, Tyese and her boyfriend, Rodney, recently had a baby. But shortly after, Tyese discovered he was being unfaithful.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: My Ex Bff Wants My Fianc' / Unlock: We Just Had A Baby, Who Are You Texting

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On Karamo, Bridgette caught her ex, Donnie, on the couch naked after being with another woman. Plus, Naiya says she helped raise her friend Mya's daughter. But now that Mya has a new man, Naiya believes she's been cast aside.
programme.sub-title: Unlock The Truth: Did You Break In? / She's My Daughter...Not Yours!

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On Karamo, Angel's relationship crumbles after rumors of Marquise's infidelity, while Jane and Pete's 18-year bliss shatters in a car accident. Seek truth on today's episode!
programme.sub-title: Unlocking My Phone; But You Have A Mistress

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Trudy is suing bar owner Jefferey for damages because she claims a drunk patron plowed into her parked car.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: After moving in together, Mackie is suing Joel for unlawfully locking her out.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Tania is suing her child's father for not reimbursing her for a cruise his daughter from another woman came on.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Allison is suing the taxi driver she hired to drive her home after a medical procedure for kicking her out.
programme.sub-title: You Threw Me Out Of Your Taxi

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: James has not paid Carlita for restoring an antique stove because he feels he was coerced into the repairs.

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested… Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Teshinya suspects that Clarence is picking up women at church and went undercover to get proof! Desirae is 17 and 5 months pregnant, but thinks her boyfriend Chris is cheating with her friend!
programme.sub-title: 5 Men Tested… Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Wife Betray Me By Sleeping with My Son?
programme.desc: Romel, his wife Chanel and her sister Nakiya are back because he thinks Chanel is sleeping with his 21-year-old son Romel Jr. who’s dating Nakiya! Later, Reggie cheated on Teri 9 times, but does he actually have a sex addiction?
programme.sub-title: Did My Wife Betray Me By Sleeping with My Son?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Maury Guest Updates…I'm Back with a Secret!
programme.desc: They ran, they ranted...but what happened when they went home? Today, some past guests return for more tests! Plus the winner of Maury’s Future Stars 2013 will be announced.
programme.sub-title: Maury Guest Updates…I'm Back with a Secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Denese and her mom return because they know Dejon fathered Denese’s daughter! Plus, Rebecca has been here 6 times for 7 DNA tests and returns for her 8th and 9th tests!
programme.sub-title: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 7 Babies. 8 Men. Who's the Father?
programme.desc: These moms are desperate to find their children's missing fathers. But these denying dads say that there's no way they're the real fathers. When the DNA results are revealed, who will be proven right and who will be still searching for answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show: He's My Husband Now. Not Your Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: These guests say they're positive they know the true identity of the father of their children, but they just need a DNA test to prove it. Now the results are about to be revealed, but will they be the results they were hoping for?
programme.sub-title: He's My Husband Now. Not Your Baby's Dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated with 97 Women. Will My Fiancé Forgive Me?
programme.desc: Did Rey cheat on Ashley while she was pregnant with his baby and have a secret threesome behind her back? Plus, Jason is worried that his uncle is paying his fiancé to sleep with him. His uncle has a shocking confession that you have to see!
programme.sub-title: I Cheated with 97 Women. Will My Fiancé Forgive Me?

programme.title: The Maury Show: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It’s a Spring Wild Safari Spectacular on today’s MAURY! Jungle Jack Hanna joins Maury to share some of the most amazing animals we’ve ever seen! Your whole family will want to tune in to watch this amazing episode of MAURY!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Case of the Hot Kimono
programme.desc: Agatha Marble helps the Turtles in their pursuit of Don Turtelli, including Splinter's treasured red robe - and holding Happy Hour News' April and Vernon prisoners.
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Hot Kimono

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi, Come Home
programme.desc: Shredder has a hare-brained scheme to turn the rabbit from another dimension, Usagi Yojimbo, into an ally of his and an enemy of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Making of Metalhead
programme.desc: Krang creates Metalhead, an exact robot replica of the Turtles with even more powers, and directs him to destroy the Turtles. Donatello, however, reprograms Metalhead over to the Turtles' side.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead Meets the Rat King
programme.desc: Leatherhead The Cajan gator goes into the sewers in pursuit of the Turtles, and encounters the Rat King, who has stolen a tanker­truck of rat poison which he plans to change into a hypnotic gas.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtle Terminator
programme.desc: Shredder captures Irma and creates an android Irma programmed to destroy the Turtles. The zap-happy robotic Irma causes havoc in the TV newsroom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Great Boldini
programme.desc: Mobster Don Turtelli and his cousin the magician, the Great Baldini, steal the famous Tortellini Emerald.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Missing Map
programme.desc: The Turtles are showing Zach, "the fifth Turtle," and his brother Walt their scrapbook.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Gang's All Here
programme.desc: Michelangelo falls for a Shredder trick and eats a chocolate chip cookie made with anti-mutagen capable of turning him into a human being.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Grybyx
programme.desc: The Neutrinos - Dask, Kala and Zak - are back on Earth in search of Kala's pet Grybyx, a small and cuddly creature that, "mega bizzarro," can turn into a humongous monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mister Ogg Goes to Town
programme.desc: When Krang realizes the Technodrome is running low on liquid nitrogen, its main source of fuel, he discovers that a formula exists in Dimension Z which transmutes crude oil, easily available on Earth, into liquid nitrogen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredderville
programme.desc: Because of all the destruction Shredder causes just trying to get rid of the Turtles, they lament that the world would be a better place had they never existed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bye - Bye Fly!
programme.desc: Plotting revenge, Baxter, who has been turned into a fly-like creature, delivers a borellium crystal to Krang and Shredder whose Technodrome is low in power.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Ripoff
programme.desc: The Technodrome is perilously close to running out of power as it teeters on the edge of a crumbling lava cliff deep within the bowels of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Break-In
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder get the Technodrome rolling again and raise it to the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Blow-Out
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder raise the Technodrome to the surface and seize unlimited energy. The Turtles and the World face their darkest hour.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Plan Six from Outer Space
programme.desc: The Turtles launch the missile from the sewers positioned under the Technodrome. It transports Bebop, Rocksteady, Krang and Shredder back to Dimension X but explodes on impact; they survive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles of the Jungle
programme.desc: Donatello's idol, inventor mad-scientist Professor Willard creates the Molecular Intensifier, a machine to control growth of living things.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Toys Around
programme.desc: Michelangelo dreams he's being attacked by Tyranno-toys. He wakes up to hear April announcing the Toy Fair opening. Determined to go, Michelangelo disguises himself as a Turtle toy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Peking Turtles
programme.desc: April O'Neil reports from the Uptown Museum about a display of artifacts from the 2000-year-old Ying Dynasty of China. The marble warriors were built to protect the world's largest pearl from being stolen from the Emperor's collection of jewels.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's Mother
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Four Turtles and A Baby
programme.desc: The Neutrinos are attacked and their leaders, Zenter and Grizzla, are seized by Krang, Shredder and General Traag.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtlemaniac
programme.desc: Widespread thievery is discovered in the city when Ninja Turtle artifacts are found missing. April and Irma prowl for the pilfering poachers, the investigation leads the reporter to the estate of Monroe Q.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rondo in New York
programme.desc: Word spreads that Oswald Oren, a nerdy Woody Allen-type student, has developed the Vitalizer - an experimental substance that brings inanimate objects to life. Scoundrels Shredder, Krang, Bebop and Rocksteady connive to steal the potion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtles
programme.desc: A commercial for the Personal Energy Projector (PEP), allowing the transfer of energy from one source to another, entices Krang. Targeting Earth, he drains the sphere's energy to strengthen the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Name That Toon
programme.desc: Krang threatens to vapourize the city by manipulating a Dematerializer, but a musical instrument that Howie, Irma's friend, plays around with, interferes with the device's programming.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Menace Maestro, Please
programme.desc: An invitation from April leads the Turtles, Irma and friend Howie to the haunted but renovated Floxy Music Hall, where the legendary Phantom of the Floxy resides.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Superhero for a Day
programme.desc: The half-shelled heroes find themselves competing with Bruce Bent, the Gadgetman, a self-proclaimed superhero from the past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Back to the Egg
programme.desc: The foursome are dining out on their favourite food when Michelangelo and Leonardo are suddenly transformed into two five year-olds, thanks to Shredder's latest invention - an age-reversing serum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Son of Return of the Fly II
programme.desc: After escaping from dimensional limbo, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) and his computer companion Z employ an experimental solid-energy generator to take over Channel Six.
programme.sub-title: Son of Return of the Fly II

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Knocks 'Em Dead!
programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe
programme.desc: When Bebop and Rocksteady steal the Anxietron Ray, they use it to scare the dickens out of everyone in their path, including the Turtles.
programme.sub-title: Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.
programme.sub-title: Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up
programme.desc: Tired of constant nagging about discipline, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello use a Personality Modifier on Leonardo to get him to lighten up.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Life After Death
programme.desc: Life After Death: Scientists in England conduct groundbreaking séances, while someone returns from the grave.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Monsters
programme.desc: Monsters: A fisherman uncovers the remains of an unidentified sea creature on a beach, and a hairy creature causes panic in New Delhi.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: The End Of The World
programme.desc: The End of the World: Decoding Mayan texts, a physicist predicts a cataclysm will destroy the world. A NASA scientist makes an alien discovery.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Parallel Worlds
programme.desc: Parallel Worlds: While hiking, a woman has a terrifying encounter with an entity from another world.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Freaks Of Nature
programme.desc: Freaks Of Nature: A small community is devastated by an earth-shattering 'boom,' while an paranormal fog seems to alter the very fabric of time.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: Paranormal Mysteries: A woman is terrorised by an invisible attacker and a mother undergoes a violent and demonic transformation.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Medical Mysteries
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: An adrenaline junkie and her unborn baby somehow survive when their parachute fails, and a firefighter is incinerated in his bed.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Power Of The Mind
programme.desc: Power of the Mind: A housewife has a strange and sudden vision that helps to solve a murder. A man remembers every single moment of his life.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Ancient Mysteries: A girl finds a 1000-year-old skull that may prove aliens once walked the planet, and ancient stone carvings could rewrite the story of evolution.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Amazing Survival
programme.desc: Amazing Survival: Incredible stories of people who cheated death, including a man who escaped from the avalanche of debris caused by the collapse of the World Trade Center.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Man Beasts
programme.desc: Man Beasts: We're all fascinated by mysteries. But is the unexplained really unexplainable? William Shatner investigates in an attempt to find a logical explanation.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Curses
programme.desc: Curses: Do cursed objects really exist? This episode explores a painting in Britain that is said to start deadly house fires, a sinister doll in Florida and a curse-proof house.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Weird Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Weird Animal Behaviour: Three extraordinary stories about the supersensory power of animals, including a psychic octopus that correctly predicted multiple World Cup winners.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ghosts In The Machine
programme.desc: Ghosts in the Machine: Three tales of everyday objects that are haunted by the dead, including the story of a man who is attacked in bed by an invisible force.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Premonitions
programme.desc: Premonitions: A look into the predictive power of the subconscious, including a man who warns of a plane crash before it happens following a series of vivid nightmares.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mysterious Vanishings
programme.desc: Mysterious Vanishings: Baffling stories of people who vanished without a trace, including a young Tasmanian pilot who is chased by unidentified aircraft before disappearing.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: Medics at a hospital fall gravely ill after treating a mysteriously ailing patient in a circumstance that can't be explained by science. Or can it?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mind Control
programme.desc: Mind Control: Three spine-tingling stories, including a seance that turns a housewife into a literary genius as she channels a spirit to write a series of acclaimed books.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet: A high-rise window washer somehow survives a 50-storey fall and ball-sized ice chunks fall from the sky.
programme.sub-title: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: The Clermont diggers face pressure to repay $15,000 worth of gold, or risk losing their mine. Meanwhile, the Mineshaft Hunters enter an abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Businessman and rookie miner Dennis gambles $500,000 on a 62-acre gold mine, while Leigh asks two British backpackers for a lesson in metal detecting.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Gold mining expert Ian Holland takes on 25-year-old rookie prospector April as an apprentice, while rookie miner Dennis tries to get started with the gold processing plant.

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Capture of a key Nazi uncovers shocking realities. Amid demands for accountability, Vera and her team navigate murky waters to confront uncomfortable truths.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Mafia and Britain
programme.desc: Ross starts his journey under the arches of Blackfriars bridge in London. In 1982, under this bridge a man was found. He had apparently hanged himself. The man was Roberto Calvi, better known as “God’s Banker".

programme.desc: Capture of a key Nazi uncovers shocking realities. Amid demands for accountability, Vera and her team navigate murky waters to confront uncomfortable truths.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones is exploring one of the oldest, and most fearsome castles ever built: The Tower of London.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: This time Dan Jones is in the heart of the English countryside exploring Warwick Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Join Historian Dan Jones as he travels back in time to explore Caernarfon Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Join Historian Dan Jones as he travels back in time to explore Stirling Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Join Historian Dan Jones as he travels back in time to explore Carrickfergus Castle.

programme.title: Iconic Combat Machines
programme.desc: Belfast Harrier: Icons of the Royal Navy in different eras, the Belfast and the Harrier have earned their place in history for different reasons.

programme.title: Iconic Combat Machines
programme.desc: Me 109 Sherman: Two of the most produced combat machines in World War II managed to stay relevant until the end of the war through constant modernization and new variants.

programme.title: Iconic Combat Machines
programme.desc: T34 Chaika: The Soviet Union produced a large variety of tanks and airplanes during World War II. What made the T34 and the Chaika stand out and become icons?

programme.title: Iconic Combat Machines
programme.desc: Me 262 Mustang: The Messerschmitt 262 was the brainchild of genius designer Willy Messerschmitt and it became the first combat jet in history.

programme.title: Iconic Combat Machines
programme.desc: F16 Mig 29: The F-16 and MiG-29, born rivals of the skies, embody opposing design ideals: US tech-driven agility versus Soviet rugged aerodynamics.

programme.title: Iconic Combat Machines
programme.desc: Leopard Tiger: The Leopard 2 is probably the best all-around Main Battle Tank today, combining great mobility, a superior gun and excellent protection.

programme.title: Iconic Combat Machines
programme.desc: Spitfire Tiger: Two iconic machines of World War II - the Spitfire symbolised British hope and resistance, while the Tiger tank embodied German power.

programme.title: History’s Greatest Myths
programme.desc: Explore the groundbreaking discoveries, inventions and inventors throughout history that have changed the way we live our lives.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper

programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: The First Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Members of the Happy Days gang find themselves transformed into Pilgrims when Marion dreams of reviving the true spirit of Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt down a dangerous escaped convict, Swarek drags Andy through his undercover hauntson a mission he won’t explain. At first, Andy assumes Swarek is a rogue cop trying to settle scores from his undercover days.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fite Nite
programme.desc: While working on a high-stakes gun raid, Andy and Gail stumble upon a victim of domestic abuse whose brutal experience in the system has taught her not to trust the police.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy’s undercover skills are tested –and found to be lacking –during a citywidecampaign to clean up the streets, whenshe’s tapped to pose as a prostitute in order to arrest unsuspecting johns.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Kane’s team is up against the “New Hope” Arian Nation as they work to sway the public’s vote in the city elections. DA Lisa Clayton fails to convict a serial rapist.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Kane, dealing with his own post war stress must help a war comrade suffering from P.T.S. who becomes a sniper terrorist suspect.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Elijah Kane’s SIU team tracks down a dangerous Yakuza gang as they attempt to distribute explosives to Afghanistan.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: The Yakuza are back on the streets and Kane's team organizes an ambush on their underground club disguised as a MMA fighting ring.

programme.title: The Border

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.sub-title: My Husband, My Boyfriend, My Big Decision

programme.sub-title: Ukranian Orphan: Child Or Adult Sociopath?

programme.sub-title: The Presence of Evil: Face-To-Face With Jeffrey Dahmer Pt.1

programme.sub-title: The Girl In The Box: Kala Brown's Story Pt.1
